rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with clear rationale for each section, improving the draft's structure significantly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged multiple uncertainties and provided detailed recommendations, marking confidence levels and missing evidence effectively.
rationale.RX.3: The output adhered strictly to the requested scope without any deviations or drifts.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; the agent identified potential issues in the original draft, ensuring downstream safety.
rationale.RX.5: While major rewrites were traced, minor edits lacked traceability, falling short of the highest standard.
